title: APEX HEALTH_METRICS.json
description: 8-metric Context Health snapshot emitted by context-monitor.sh health-json mode and rendered by /apex:status (R2-C212 dashboard, R2-C213 indicators). Spec anchors: 'First-hour usability.' (apex-spec.md axis 4); R2-C212 (HIGH 5/5) 'Context Health Dashboard (8 metric categories with alert thresholds)'; R2-C213 (HIGH 5/5) 'User-facing indicators: context-fill gauge, last rotation timestamp, stale-state warnings, memory freshness, verification confidence'. Each top-level property maps to exactly one of the 8 R2-C212 metric categories; consumers MUST NOT add 9th categories without spec amendment.

gauge.description: Metric 1/8 — context-fill gauge (R2-C213). status='unmeasured' when STATE.tokens.total_input is 0 (counter unwired); 'ok'/'warn'/'crit' otherwise relative to thresholds.

pct.description: Integer percent of effective capacity; null when status='unmeasured'.

budget_by_zone.description: Metric 2/8 — per-zone token allocation snapshot. Each zone is {used, budget} except gen_reserve which is reserved-only.

cache_efficiency.description: Metric 3/8 — prompt-cache hit rate (R13-004 data source). status='n/a' for adapters without prompt-caching support.

last_rotation.description: Metric 4/8 — last rotation timestamp + reason (R13-005 data source, R2-C213 indicator). at=null and ago_minutes=null when no rotation has occurred yet.

at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp or null for 'never'.

reason.description: rotation_reason free-form tag (phase_boundary, hard_rotate, etc.) or null.

last_mask.description: Metric 5/8 — last observation-masking event (R13-002 data source). at=null when no mask has occurred yet.

blocks_masked.description: Stale tool-result blocks masked at last invocation.

drift_indicators.description: Metric 6/8 — drift indicator snapshot (R13-005 data source). Mirrors STATE.session.drift_indicators (or STATE.drift_indicators for legacy projects).

quality_rolling.description: Metric 7/8 — rolling task-quality + verifier-confidence (Phase 12 M16 deliverable). status='n/a' renders 'n/a (Phase 12 M16 pending)' until M16 lands.

alerts.description: Metric 8/8 — alert items (empty array = none). Each item is a short user-facing string; ordered most-severe first.

budget.description: Token budget for this zone (from CONTEXT_BUDGET.json zone_budgets).
